item.sparktraits.capsule.tooltip.empty: Right-click this capsule with food or a drink on the cursor to fill it.
trait.sparktraits.last_stand.name: Last Stand
trait.sparktraits.conscience.name: Conscience
trait.sparktraits.conscience.description: Your conscience still knows who deserves to live.
trait.sparktraits.impostor.name: Impostor
trait.sparktraits.impostor.description: You know which side the truth belongs to.
trait.sparktraits.cautious.name: Cautious
trait.sparktraits.cautious.description: Your movement, eating, and drinking make no sound.
trait.sparktraits.task_master.name: Task Master
trait.sparktraits.task_master.descriptio: Finishing tasks grants a small extra sanity or money bonus.
trait.sparktraits.fast_hands.name: Fast Hands
trait.sparktraits.fast_hands.description: Your item cooldowns are slightly shorter.
trait.sparktraits.childish.name: Childish
trait.sparktraits.childish.description: You are a quarter smaller than usual.
trait.sparktraits.steady.name: Steady
trait.sparktraits.steady.description: Your real sanity can rise above the normal limit.
trait.sparktraits.excellent_physique.des: Your stamina limit and natural stamina recovery are doubled.
trait.sparktraits.extroverted.name: Extroverted
trait.sparktraits.extroverted.descriptio: Your sanity does not drain while at least two other living players are within eight blocks.
trait.sparktraits.introverted.name: Introverted
trait.sparktraits.introverted.descriptio: Your sanity does not drain while at most one other living player is within eight blocks.
trait.sparktraits.money_tree.name: Money Tree
trait.sparktraits.money_tree.description: If your role uses money, gain 5 money every 30 seconds.
trait.sparktraits.focus.name: Focus
trait.sparktraits.focus.description: After hitting with a revolver, ordinary good roles keep their sanity.
trait.sparktraits.marksman.name: Marksman
trait.sparktraits.marksman.description: Your revolver and derringer reach thirty percent farther.
trait.sparktraits.fast_reload.name: Fast Reload
trait.sparktraits.fast_reload.descriptio: Your revolver cooldown is thirty percent shorter.
trait.sparktraits.heavy_artillery.name: Heavy Artillery
trait.sparktraits.heavy_artillery.descri: Close-range gunshots resolve twice, piercing a single shield layer.
trait.sparktraits.niko.name: Niko
trait.sparktraits.niko.description: While sneaking, gain night vision and extend revolver and derringer range to 300 blocks. Sneaking revolver shots fire three times and trigger a 60-second cooldown.
trait.sparktraits.well_trained.name: Well Trained
trait.sparktraits.well_trained.descripti: Low sanity no longer hinders you, and sanity drains thirty percent slower.
trait.sparktraits.going_dark.name: Going Dark
trait.sparktraits.going_dark.description: During blackouts, killer and impostor instinct cannot reveal you by default.
trait.sparktraits.bloodthirsty.name: Bloodthirsty
trait.sparktraits.bloodthirsty.descripti: Each real kill slightly shortens your knife cooldown, up to the player-count cap.
trait.sparktraits.the_showman.name: The Showman
trait.sparktraits.the_showman.descriptio: Real kills grant extra money for nearby living players.
trait.sparktraits.plunderer.name: Plunderer
trait.sparktraits.plunderer.description: Real kills steal part of the victim's money.
trait.sparktraits.charisma.name: Charisma
trait.sparktraits.charisma.description: Shop prices are reduced by ten percent.
trait.sparktraits.paranoid.name: Paranoid
trait.sparktraits.thrust.name: Thrust
trait.sparktraits.thrust.description: Knife and poison needle punches knock players back harder.
trait.sparktraits.second_strike.name: Second Strike
trait.sparktraits.second_strike.descript: Shield-blocked attacks immediately resolve one extra time.
trait.sparktraits.oppressive.name: Oppressive
trait.sparktraits.oppressive.description: While you are alive and present, real sanity drains faster for everyone.
trait.sparktraits.cornered.name: Cornered
trait.sparktraits.cornered.description: Gain money as killer-side allies die, with a bonus when you are the last one left.
announcement.goal.sparktraits.conscience: Use your abilities to help the innocents survive!
announcement.goal.sparktraits.impostor: Use your identity to secure victory for the killer team.
message.sparktraits.criminologist.not_en: You need %s coins to use Criminologist.
message.sparktraits.criminologist.target: You cannot switch targets while the suspect is alive.
message.sparktraits.criminologist.killer: The recorded killer is no longer alive.
message.sparktraits.criminologist.target: Your tracked target died. Criminologist is cooling down.
message.sparktraits.silenced_killer.abil: You are silenced and cannot use abilities.
shop.error.sparktraits.silenced_killer: You are silenced and cannot buy items.
